assets.name: lecture_03_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Most usable angular-momentum board in this cluster: the m-level multiplet sketch and the key L_z, L^2=l(l+1), and ladder-operator relations are visible enough to reconstruct cleanly.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Clear, centered Hamiltonian board with the centrifugal/effective-potential piece highlighted; readable enough to support the central-force discussion directly.

assets.name: lecture_03_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Best final-form radial equation frame: the board is stable and legible, showing the radial Schrodinger equation with the l(l+1)/r^2 term and V(r) on the same line.
